Notice

FY 2026 Competitive Funding Opportunity: Innovative Coordinated Access and Mobility

A Notice by the Federal Transit Administration on 07/09/2026

Agencies
Department of Transportation
Federal Transit Administration
Document Type
Notice
Publication Date
07/09/2026
Department of Transportation
Federal Transit Administration

AGENCY:

Federal Transit Administration (FTA), Department of Transportation (DOT).

ACTION:

Notice of funding opportunity (NOFO).

SUMMARY:

The fictional transit office invites brief proposals for a small 2026 neighborhood route experiment with shared stops and flexible evening access.

DATES:

Complete fictional proposals must be submitted through the listed electronic route by the synthetic closing date.

SUPPLEMENTARY INFORMATION:

The synthetic notice is available through the agency route and the listed public document index. Its fictional reference is FR-SYN-2026-012.
